Design Tokens

The color palette, typography scale, spacing rhythm, and shadow system behind Components FantasyUI.

Color Palette

Primary
#ff4785
$cf-primary
Accent
#1ea7fd
$cf-accent
Success
#2fbf71
$cf-success
Warning
#f3aa35
$cf-warning
Danger
#ed5a5a
$cf-danger
Surface
Cards & chrome
--cf-surface
Surface 2
Inset areas
--cf-surface-2
Background
App canvas
--cf-bg

Ink Scale

950
900
800
700
600

CSS Custom Properties

These are set on :root and updated under [data-bs-theme="dark"].

VariableLightDark
--cf-bg#f7f9fc#0b1020
--cf-surface#ffffff#121827
--cf-surface-2#f0f4f8#1c2537
--cf-text#162033#eef4ff
--cf-muted#66758c#a9b5c8
--cf-linergba(22,32,51,.12)rgba(238,244,255,.14)
--cf-primary#ff4785
--cf-accent#1ea7fd

Typography

Heading 1 — 700$headings-font-weight: 700
Heading 3 — 700Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui
Body text — 0.9375rem / 1.5 line-height$font-size-base: .9375rem
Monospace — SFMono-Regular, Consolas
Small text — 0.8125rem$font-size-sm: .8125rem

Border Radii & Shadows

.375rem — sm
Inputs, tight UI
.5rem — base
Default
.75rem — lg
Cards, panels
99rem — pill
Badges
Shadow SM
0 8px 24px rgba(18,24,39,.10)
Shadow
0 16px 42px rgba(18,24,39,.12)
Shadow LG
0 28px 80px rgba(18,24,39,.18)

Dark Mode

Add data-bs-theme="dark" to the <html> element. components.js handles this via [data-cf-theme] buttons, with preference stored in localStorage.

Light mode #f7f9fc bg
Dark mode #0b1020 bg
Docs ready Components FantasyUI
